title: May God Bestow on Us His Grace
_abc_source:
X: 295
T: May God Bestow on Us His Grace
%%combinevoices 1
T: (also known as May God Unto Us Gracious Be or Would that the Lord Would Grant Us Grace)
C: Words: Martin Luther, 1524.  Translated by Richard Massie, 1854, alt. 
C: Music: 'Es Wollt uns Gott Genædig' adapted from older German hymn by Martin Luther. Found in Erfurt Enchiridion, 1524. 
C: Setting: "Concordia Kinderchöre", 1908.
C: copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2009 Revision.
S: Music source: Concordia Kinderchöre, 1908 Hymn 128 page 152.
